exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This information must be kept secret.
This notice should be read by every student.
This problem can be solved.
This book should be read.

exercises.audioScript: This rule must be known to everyone.
exercises.hindiScript: यह नियम सभी को पता होना चाहिए।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This project will be started next month.
This work must be completed on time.
This rule should be followed.
This rule must be known to everyone.
exercises.answer: This rule must be known to everyone.

exercises.audioScript: This meeting will be called next week.
exercises.hindiScript: यह मीटिंग अगले हफ्ते बुलाई जाएगी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This question can be asked easily.
The new policy will be implemented next year.
This form must be filled.
This meeting will be called next week.
exercises.answer: This meeting will be called next week.

exercises.hindiScript: इसे बेहतर बनाया जा सकता है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This book should be read.
This issue can be discussed.
This letter will be sent tomorrow.
This can be made better.

exercises.audioScript: This notice should be read by every student.
exercises.hindiScript: हर student को यह notice पढ़ना चाहिए।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This rule must be known to everyone.
Every rule should be followed.
This mistake can be corrected.
This notice should be read by every student.
exercises.answer: This notice should be read by every student.

exercises.audioScript: This work must be completed on time.
exercises.hindiScript: यह काम समय पर पूरा किया जाना चाहिए।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This meeting will be called next week.
This responsibility must be taken.
This decision should be taken quickly.
This work must be completed on time.
exercises.answer: This work must be completed on time.

exercises.audioScript: The new policy will be implemented next year.
exercises.hindiScript: नई policy अगले साल लागू की जाएगी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This can be made better.
This work will be completed tomorrow.
This information must be kept secret.
The new policy will be implemented next year.
exercises.answer: The new policy will be implemented next year.

exercises.hindiScript: इस मुद्दे पर चर्चा की जा सकती है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This notice should be read by every student.
This problem can be solved.
This project will be started next month.
This issue can be discussed.

dictationPassage.text: This book should be read. This rule must be known to everyone. This meeting will be called next week. This can be made better. This notice should be read by every student.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: यह किताब पढ़ी जानी चाहिए। यह नियम सभी को पता होना चाहिए। यह मीटिंग अगले हफ्ते बुलाई जाएगी। इसे बेहतर बनाया जा सकता है। हर student को यह notice पढ़ना चाहिए।
